data.title: Erdene Extends Mineralization at Zuun Mod Molybdenum-Copper Project in Mongolia
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Erdene Resources ( (TSE:ERD) ) has issued an update.

Erdene Resource Development reported drilling results from its Zuun Mod molybdenum-copper project in Mongolia, showing multiple near-surface intersections of ore-grade mineralization in zones previously modelled as waste. The latest campaign, including a 3,362-metre program and an extended deep hole, confirmed continuity and higher-grade molybdenum and copper mineralization, particularly in the North Racetrack area.

Key hole ZMD-98 returned 374 metres averaging 0.066% molybdenum equivalent from 76 to 450 metres, remaining open at depth and laterally. The company plans to update the Zuun Mod mineral resource using these results and incorporate them into a preliminary economic assessment scheduled for mid-2026, which could enhance project economics and strengthen Erdene’s position in molybdenum and copper amid improved regional infrastructure and strong demand.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ERD) stock is a Hold with a C$8.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Erdene Resources stock, see the TSE:ERD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ERD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ERD is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance: no revenue, widening losses, and continued negative operating/free cash flow despite a low-leverage balance sheet. Technicals provide a meaningful offset with price above key moving averages and positive MACD/RSI momentum. Valuation remains a risk signal because the negative P/E reflects ongoing losses and there is no dividend yield support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ERD stock, click here.

More about Erdene Resources

Erdene Resource Development is a mineral exploration and development company focused on Mongolia’s Khundii Minerals District. Its key assets include the Bayan Khundii Gold Mine and the wholly owned Zuun Mod molybdenum-copper project, which forms part of the larger Khuvyn Khar copper porphyry system in southwestern Mongolia.

Average Trading Volume: 185,878

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$539M

data.description:

An update from FiscalNote Holdings ( (NOTE) ) is now available.

On February 17, 2026, CEO Josh Resnik outlined FiscalNote’s next phase of growth, emphasizing the company’s move into political prediction markets and its broader strategy to adapt to changing information consumption. He framed FiscalNote’s proprietary data, credibility in high-stakes policy environments, and existing customer base as key assets for entering these emerging information markets and elevating market integrity through transparency and strong governance.

Resnik also highlighted plans to expand delivery of FiscalNote’s insights beyond a single platform, deepening API-based integrations and supporting AI agents so customers can rely on authoritative, well-governed data in increasingly automated decision-making. PolicyNote remains central as a modern, AI-forward platform, while the company pushes operational efficiencies, greater use of AI, and a shift from Adjusted EBITDA profitability toward consistent positive free cash flow, signaling a focus on sustainable financial performance alongside product expansion.

The most recent analyst rating on (NOTE) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on FiscalNote Holdings stock, see the NOTE Stock Forecast page.

data.title: MHP SE to Fully Redeem Remaining 2026 Notes After Tender Offer
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from MHP SE GDR RegS ( (MHPSY) ).

MHP SE has confirmed that all conditions have been met for the conditional redemption of its 6.95% Notes due 2026 issued by MHP Lux S.A., following the tender offer launched in January 2026. The company will redeem the remaining outstanding principal of U.S.$218,014,000 on 18 February 2026 at a total redemption price of U.S.$223,695,989.88, reflecting an above-par payout to noteholders.

The transaction effectively retires the entirety of this bond issue, simplifying MHP’s debt structure and potentially strengthening its balance sheet ahead of future financing needs. By fully redeeming the notes, MHP may reduce interest expenses associated with the 6.95% coupon and enhance its financial flexibility, which could be seen as supportive for the company’s long-term capital management and credit profile.

More about MHP SE GDR RegS

MHP SE is a leading international food and agricultural group with Ukrainian roots and is among the largest poultry producers in Europe. The company focuses on poultry production and related agribusiness activities, supplying both domestic and international markets with meat and food products.

For an in-depth examination of MHPSY stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Logistea strengthens logistics portfolio with SEK 138 million acquisition of fully leased Swedish properties
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Logistea AB Class A ( ($SE:LOGI.A) ).

Logistea AB has expanded its logistics and light industrial property portfolio with the completion of an acquisition of three fully leased assets in Karlstad, Kumla and Lindesberg. The properties, held via property-owning companies, have a combined underlying value of SEK 138 million and add 9,378 square meters of lettable area to the group.

The newly acquired buildings, constructed between 2006 and 2023, are in very good condition and primarily comprise refrigeration and freezer storage, warehouse, workshop and office space. They are fully leased to Bama Foods, Arnessons Betongborrning, Maskin Väst and smaller tenants on leases averaging 6.5 years, generating annual rental income of about SEK 10.9 million and shifting most operating and maintenance costs to the tenants, with the transaction financed through a mix of own funds and bank loans.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:LOGI.A) stock is a Hold with a SEK16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Logistea AB Class A stock, see the SE:LOGI.A Stock Forecast page.

More about Logistea AB Class A

Logistea AB is a Swedish real estate company specializing in warehousing, logistics and light industrial properties. The company, listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under the tickers LOGI A and LOGI B, focuses on income-generating assets leased to industrial, logistics and storage tenants across regional markets in Sweden.

Average Trading Volume: 3,899

data.title: Cyclerion Gains FDA Support for CYC-126 Depression Study
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Cyclerion Therapeutics ( (CYCN) ) has shared an update.

On February 17, 2026, Cyclerion announced positive written feedback from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration on the planned Phase 2 proof-of-concept study of CYC-126 in treatment-resistant depression, providing clarity on regulatory jurisdiction and the development pathway under CDER with input from CDRH. Leveraging FDA-approved anesthetics and established safety data, the company said it remains on track to start the Phase 2 study in the second half of 2026, with first patient enrollment in Australia and U.S. enrollment expected in the first half of 2027.

The company also disclosed the formation of a Clinical Advisory Board composed of five internationally recognized experts in neuropsychiatry, anesthesiology, clinical care, and drug development, who will guide key decisions as Cyclerion advances CYC-126 and seeks to build a broader neuropsychiatric pipeline. This move positions Cyclerion to strengthen its clinical strategy and potentially enhance its standing in the emerging field of precision-delivered anesthetic-based therapies for hard-to-treat mood disorders.

Spark’s Take on CYCN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CYCN is a Neutral.

Cyclerion Therapeutics’ overall stock score is primarily influenced by its financial difficulties, including consistent net losses and negative cash flows, despite having a solid equity position and no debt. The technical analysis provides a slightly more optimistic view with some bullish momentum, but the valuation remains unattractive due to ongoing financial challenges. The lack of earnings call or corporate events data means these factors did not affect the score.

To see Spark’s full report on CYCN stock, click here.

More about Cyclerion Therapeutics

Cyclerion Therapeutics, Inc. is a Nasdaq-listed biopharmaceutical company focused on pioneering neuropsychiatric therapies. Its lead product candidate, CYC-126, is a potentially novel anesthetic-based investigational treatment for treatment-resistant depression that combines well-characterized anesthetic agents with real-time EEG monitoring and algorithm-guided dosing to deliver individualized, precision therapy.

data.title: Santander UK Prices €2.25bn in New Covered Bonds Under €35bn Programme
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Santander UK ( (GB:SANB) ) just unveiled an update.

Santander UK has issued final terms for two new series of fixed-rate covered bonds under its €35 billion Global Covered Bond Programme, comprising a €1.25 billion bond maturing in May 2029 and a €1 billion bond maturing in February 2033. The documentation for Series 94 and 95 has been made available via the London Stock Exchange, the FCA’s National Storage Mechanism and the bank’s website, enhancing transparency for investors and supporting the bank’s ongoing wholesale funding strategy.

The move reinforces Santander UK’s presence in the covered bond market and provides the bank with sizeable, long-term euro funding to back its balance sheet and lending activities. By tapping institutional demand for high-quality covered debt, the bank continues to diversify its funding sources, which can bolster liquidity, lower funding costs over time and potentially benefit customers and other stakeholders through more stable access to credit.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:SANB) stock is a Hold with a £146.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Santander UK stock, see the GB:SANB Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Coronado Issues February Business Update on Operations and Markets
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Coronado Global Resources Inc. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 10 Sh ( (AU:CRN) ) has shared an update.

Coronado Global Resources Inc. provided a February 16, 2026 business update detailing the gradual restart of operations at the Mammoth Underground Mine in Queensland after a fatal accident on January 2, 2026, with production expected to return to full levels within weeks under enhanced safety requirements. Australian open-cut operations recovered from Tropical Cyclone Koji without material production impact, a planned shutdown of the Curragh Complex processing plants was completed to improve throughput and product mix, and the Queensland Financial Provisioning Scheme confirmed Curragh needs only a 6.5% pool contribution, about US$15 million, for its rehabilitation obligations by the end of the March quarter.

In the U.S., weak High-Vol metallurgical coal prices have pushed the Logan Complex into operating losses, prompting Coronado to immediately curtail production to meet existing contracts through March 2026 and to plan a temporary idling if no profitable additional offtake is secured, while a planned longwall move at the Buchanan Complex was completed with another scheduled for March. The company noted that cash flow in the March and June 2026 quarters should benefit from higher Premium Low Volatile coal prices and stronger output, and it highlighted supportive market fundamentals for high-quality metallurgical coal, underpinned by steady steel production and supply constraints, reinforcing its positioning in a market where metallurgical coal has been classed as strategic in India and the U.S.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CRN) stock is a Hold with a A$0.37 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Coronado Global Resources Inc. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 10 Sh stock, see the AU:CRN Stock Forecast page.

More about Coronado Global Resources Inc. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 10 Sh

Coronado Global Resources Inc. is an Australia- and U.S.-focused producer of high-quality metallurgical coal used in steelmaking, operating underground and open-cut mines including the Curragh Complex in Queensland and the Logan and Buchanan complexes in the U.S., and is positioned to serve key steel-producing regions where metallurgical coal has been designated a strategic or critical mineral.

Average Trading Volume: 6,028,402

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$570M

data.title: Genuine Parts Plans Automotive-Industrial Business Separation for 2026
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Genuine Parts Company ( (GPC) ).

On February 17, 2026, Genuine Parts Company reported fourth-quarter 2025 sales of $6.0 billion, up 4.1% year over year, but booked a net loss of $609 million due largely to a one-time, non-cash pension settlement charge, while adjusted earnings remained profitable. For full-year 2025, sales grew 3.5% to $24.3 billion with $1.0 billion in adjusted net income, and the board approved a 3.2% dividend increase to $4.25 annually, extending the company’s 70-year streak of annual dividend hikes and signaling confidence despite margin pressures and restructuring costs.

Segment results showed modest growth in North America Automotive, stronger top-line gains but margin compression in International Automotive, and solid revenue and margin expansion in the Industrial segment. The company ended 2025 with $1.5 billion of liquidity and positive free cash flow and, alongside its 2026 outlook calling for 3% to 5.5% sales growth, it announced plans to separate its automotive and industrial operations into two independent public companies to sharpen strategic focus and potentially unlock shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (GPC) stock is a Buy with a $162.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Genuine Parts Company stock, see the GPC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GPC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GPC is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed fundamentals: steady sales and margin improvements are outweighed by weaker cash flow conversion and some profitability pressure. Technicals are supportive with price above major moving averages and positive MACD, but momentum appears somewhat stretched. Valuation is moderate-to-rich at a 23.05 P/E, tempered by a 3.08% dividend yield, while earnings call updates were constructive but cautious given macro and tariff uncertainties.

Wesco International, Inc. announced a planned chief financial officer transition in February 2026, reflecting an orderly leadership change in its finance organization. The company reported that David S. Schulz remained Executive Vice President and CFO until a mutually agreed transition date, after which he would shift into an advisory role prior to retirement.

data.title: DriveItAway Holdings Delays Quarterly SEC Filing
data.description:
DriveItAway Holdings ( (DWAY) ) has released a notification of late filing.

President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

DriveItAway Holdings, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25, notifying investors that it will be late in submitting its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The company says the delay relates specifically to its need for more time to compile and review information to ensure its quarterly disclosure is complete and accurate.

Management cites additional time for internal review and preparation as the main reason, rather than any identified failure of controls or external issues such as auditor changes. The company emphasizes that this extra work is aimed at making sure all required details are properly presented in the upcoming Form 10-Q (Quarter Report).

DriveItAway expects to file the delayed Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) no later than the fifth calendar day after its original due date, consistent with the time extension allowed under SEC rules. This suggests the company views the delay as short-term and procedural rather than a sign of deeper financial or operational stress.

The company does not anticipate any significant change in its operating results compared with the same quarter a year earlier, based on what it currently knows. Investors should still treat any expectations about future results as forward-looking statements that could change once the full Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) is filed and reviewed.

DriveItAway confirms it is current with all other required SEC filings and is working to complete the quarter’s report within the permitted grace period. The notification is signed by Chief Executive Officer John Possumato, underscoring the company’s commitment to regulatory compliance and timely disclosure once the review is finished.

More about DriveItAway Holdings

Average Trading Volume: 56,039

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $4.98M
